title: Caamas Firestorm

{{Quote|Well back before I was born, right after the Clone Wars, the world of Caamas was brutally attacked and hit with enough firepower that the vegetation boiled off the world, leaving it a dead rock, and the vast majority of the Caamasi dead with it. Because of the thoroughness and sheer ferocity of the attack, no one knew who had ordered it or carried it out. And no one knew ''why'' it had been carried out.|[[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]]|<ref name="IJ">''[[I, Jedi]]''</ref>}}
The '''Caamas Firestorm''',<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> also known as the '''destruction of Caamas''',<ref name="SOTP" /> was a vicious attack on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Caamas/Legends|Caamas]] perpetrated by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]].

==Background==
{{Quote|The dark battle fleet gathered over Caamas...|The [[Old Recluse]]|<ref name="SOTP" />}}
Due to their free-thinking ways and adherence to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], the [[Caamasi/Legends|Caamasi]] were perceived by [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] as a threat to his rule, and he orchestrated a plan to wipe them out.<ref name="SOTP" />

==The event==
{{Quote|Mysterious Disaster Strikes Caamas|Newsreport on the incident|<ref name="CN2:SoS" />}}
Enlisting the aid of [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] operatives on the ground, Palpatine had Caamas's planetary shields switched off,<ref name="SOTP" /> subjecting the world to a [[Base Delta Zero/Legends|fiery bombardment]] from [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]].<ref name="SOTG07">[[Starships of the Galaxy (Saga Edition)|''Starships of the Galaxy'', Saga Edition]]</ref>

The attack led to firestorms that lasted for years, finishing off the remaining plant life that survived the initial devastation. Surviving animal life was slowly killed off due to starvation or asphyxiation. Most of the Caamasi population were killed in the attack, with an estimated 200 survivors left alive after the bombardment.<ref name="SOTP" />

==Aftermath==
{{Quote|The outrage at the time was certainly widespread enough. Worse even than when your own Alderaan was destroyed.|[[Talon Karrde]] to [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]]|<ref name="SOTP" />}}
[[File:CaamasiJungle.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Caamas after the restoration.]]
Due to the loss of all plant life, the planet experienced heavy erosion which changed the surface features. Soot and smoke filled the atmosphere, altering the planet's climate, and the [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]] became polluted from runoff. Breath masks became mandatory for any visitors to the world who planned on staying outdoors for longer periods of time.<ref name="CATCW">''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''</ref>

An extensive outrage in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] followed the attack, due to the severity of the crime. Caamasi refugees found temporary homes on planets such as [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]], [[Kerilt]], and [[Susevfi]].<ref name="IJ" /> Alderaan was noted as having a large collection of information on the attack in its royal library.

Years afterwards, the group responsible remained unknown. Imperial propaganda stated that a wayward cluster of high-yield [[actinium bomb]]s originating with the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|CIS]] had detonated on the planet.<ref name="CN2:SoS" /> The Galactic Empire's guilt and the aid given by the Bothans was eventually uncovered. This fact came to a head with the [[Caamas Document Crisis]] in [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]].<ref name="SOTP" />
